headline: Our Portfolio
subtitle: Real solutions for real Cambodian businesses — from landing pages to full-scale web applications.

projects.title: MR App
projects.description: Training enrollment and job-matching mobile prototype. Designed for low-bandwidth environments with offline form submission.

projects.title: Super App
projects.description: All-in-one mobile platform prototype combining HR, training, and job-matching services into a unified experience.

projects.title: MR Labs
projects.description: Laboratory management platform for MR Training & Jobs Center — tracking lab resources, schedules, and student progress.

projects.title: MR HRM
projects.description: Human Resource Management system for MR Training & Jobs Center — employee records, payroll, and attendance tracking.

projects.title: MR Training & Jobs
projects.description: Main website for MR Training & Jobs Center — Cambodia's leading vocational training and job placement platform.

projects.title: Oddar Meanchey
projects.description: Provincial government website prototype for Oddar Meanchey — modernizing public service access for Cambodian citizens.

projects.title: InnoLab
projects.description: Innovation lab platform prototype — connecting Cambodian startups with mentors, investors, and resources.

projects.title: VersionDragon
projects.description: Version control and release management tool — simplifying software versioning and deployment workflows.

projects.title: Rithy Reach Portfolio
projects.description: Personal portfolio website showcasing professional work and creative projects with modern animations.

projects.title: Automata
projects.description: No-code workflow automation for repetitive office tasks. Trigger-based scheduling with Telegram and email notifications.

projects.title: OukChakTrong
projects.description: An entertaining game prototype inspired by the traditional Cambodian game Ouk Chak Trong — modernized for digital play.
